**Subject Line:**  
**[Bank Name] – Verify Your Account Details to Ensure Security**

---

**Body:**

Dear [Customer Name],

We have recently detected unusual activity on your [Bank Name] account. To ensure the security of your account and protect your personal information, we kindly request you to verify your account details by clicking on the link below:

[Verify Your Account Details](https://www.bank-name.com/verify-account)

Please note that this is a secure link, and we will not ask for your password or any other sensitive information through this process.

If you did not request this verification, please contact our Customer Support team immediately at [Customer Support Phone Number] or visit your nearest branch for further assistance.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter. We appreciate your cooperation in keeping your account secure.

Sincerely,  
[Bank Name]  
Customer Support Team  
[Bank Website URL] | [Social Media Links]

---

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,  
**FirstTrust Bank Security Team**  
[Bank Logo]
